title: Fatal error on split variable when tracing is enabled

features.name: split_var attribute with undriven port under tracing
features.description: Code should include a variable with /*verilator split_var*/ attribute connected to a module output port that is left undriven when tracing is enabled

features.name: split_var on multi-dimensional packed array
features.description: Code should include a multi-dimensional packed array with the /*verilator split_var*/ attribute

features.name: partially connected module instantiation with tracing
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation with an undriven output port when tracing is enabled
